title: This Website
summary: The Astro site you're looking at right now — portfolio, project tracker, and hobby hub.
details: Built with Astro, deployed to Netlify, data stored as JSON files in the repo. Covers projects, resume, MTG collection, board games, D&D campaigns, and learning progress.

title: Homelab Inventory
summary: Structured inventory of homelab hardware, VMs, and network topology — with a visual network map.
details: A living snapshot of the homelab: physical hardware specs, VM configurations, VLAN layout, and a canvas-rendered network diagram. Designed to eventually transition into a live asset tracker as the lab grows.

title: Active Directory Lab
summary: Windows Server 2022 AD environment with domain controllers, GPOs, OUs, and scripted user provisioning.
details: Built on Proxmox using Windows Server 2022. Covers DC setup, OU structure, Group Policy enforcement, DNS configuration, and PowerShell scripts for bulk user provisioning. Built to mirror enterprise AD environments for hands-on learning.

title: Security Onion Lab
summary: Security Onion 2.4 deployment for network security monitoring, IDS/IPS, and SIEM in the homelab.
details: Deployed on Proxmox, configured to monitor homelab traffic across VLANs. Covers initial setup, sensor configuration, detection rule tuning, and integration notes. Used alongside TryHackMe learning paths for hands-on blue team practice.
